title: aster mongolicus
intro: Aster mongolicus, also known as Mongolian Aster, is a perennial plant native to China and Mongolia, characterized by its purple flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster mongolicus include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant's herbal preparations include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
